productDisplayName: Manchester United Men Printed White Tshirt
description: Composition White T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves, red stitch detailing on the back of the shoulders and brand name in red graphic print on the front Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours below 40 degrees Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron do not iron on decorations What better way to show your support for the team than to slip into this stylish T-shirt from manchester united. The soft cotton fabric offers exemplary dry comfort, making it a great everyday wear for your casual days. Team this tee with jeans and running shoes for a sporty look.
